summary: Iteration 112 - Frontend testing for footer stability and guest header language selector. Footer is stable but language selector is NOT rendering for guest users.

ui_bugs.issue: Guest header language selector (TR/DE/FR buttons) is NOT rendering despite renderLanguageSelector() being called in code at line 303
ui_bugs.evidence: DOM inspection shows guest section has only 1 child (dynamic list), no language selector div with ml-1 class found anywhere

footer_stability.description: Footer remains visible after initial load (tested 0s, 5s, 8s intervals). Footer is stable and does not disappear.
footer_stability.note: Footer is using dynamic API content (1 row: Hakkımızda, Kurumsal açıklama) - NOT the fallback links

footer_fallback_render.description: Fallback footer (site-footer-fallback-links) is NOT being used because API returns valid data. Cannot test fallback visibility in current state.

guest_header_language_selector.description: Language selector with TR/DE/FR buttons is NOT visible in guest header

action_items: HIGH: Fix guest header language selector - renderLanguageSelector() is called but NOT rendering to DOM
Investigate why supportedLanguages from useLanguage() might be empty or why the render result is being swallowed
Check if React Fragment or conditional rendering issue is preventing the language selector from appearing
Verify SiteHeader.jsx line 303: {renderLanguageSelector()} is being executed
critical_code_review_comments: SiteHeader.jsx line 171-188: renderLanguageSelector() maps supportedLanguages but output not appearing in DOM
SiteHeader.jsx line 282-304: Guest header section calls renderLanguageSelector() but only dynamic list child is rendered
Possible issue: supportedLanguages may be empty or undefined from useLanguage() context
SiteFooter.jsx lines 76-91: Code accesses layout.rows BEFORE null check at line 109 - potential bug that could cause errors if layout is null during fetch
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guest header language selector NOT rendering - needs fix in SiteHeader.jsx. Footer is stable using API data (not fallback). Footer fallback logic appears correct but cannot be tested when API returns data.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Guest header language selector not visible
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: renderLanguageSelector() is being called at SiteHeader.jsx line 303 but the DOM shows only 1 child element in site-header-guest div (the dynamic list wrapper). The language selector div with data-testid='site-header-language-selector' and ml-1 class is completely absent from the DOM.
possible_causes: supportedLanguages from useLanguage() is empty/undefined, causing map() to render nothing
A React fragment or wrapper issue is preventing the element from being appended
Hot reload issue where the code change wasn't deployed correctly
reproduction_steps: Navigate to https://header-config-1.preview.emergentagent.com as guest (not logged in)
Inspect header area for language selector buttons (TR/DE/FR)
Observe: Selector not found, only dynamic list items present
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Verify supportedLanguages is being passed from LanguageContext. Add fallback: supportedLanguages = supportedLanguages || ['tr', 'de', 'fr'] before map in renderLanguageSelector
